code:
class CarConfigurator:
    def __init__(self):
        self._engine = "Standard"
        self._color = "White"
        self._features = []

    def with_engine(self, engine_type: str):
        self._engine = engine_type
        return self

    def with_color(self, color_name: str):
        self._color = color_name
        return self

    def add_feature(self, feature_name: str):
        self._features.append(feature_name)
        return self

    def configure(self) -> dict:
        return {
            "engine": self._engine,
            "color": self._color,
            "features": self._features
        }

# Fluent arayüz kullanımı
car_config = CarConfigurator() \
    .with_engine("V8 Turbo") \
    .with_color("Midnight Blue") \
    .add_feature("Panoramic Sunroof") \
    .add_feature("Heated Seats") \
    .add_feature("Advanced Infotainment System") \
    .configure()

print("Car 1 Configuration:")
for key, value in car_config.items():
    print(f"  {key.capitalize()}: {value}")

print("\n---")

# Başka bir örnek
car_config_2 = CarConfigurator() \
    .with_color("Racing Red") \
    .add_feature("Sport Suspension") \
    .configure()

print("Car 2 Configuration:")
for key, value in car_config_2.items():
    print(f"  {key.capitalize()}: {value}")
